rationale: The assistant does not directly list a migration checklist. It first reframes the premise: SPA is not obsolete merely because of a trend narrative, and SSR should be chosen based on objective functions such as SEO, LCP/first screen, accessibility, caching cost, ops complexity, team efficiency, and risk. It asks clarifying goal/constraint/evidence questions before giving bounded migration steps, and explicitly advises against one-size-fits-all full-site SSR migration.
